description_long: This is a plush toy modeled after the character E.T. from the film 'E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial.' The toy features a large, rounded head with prominent blue eyes and a small, flat nose. Its body is covered in a blue hooded sweatshirt with a white drawstring, and the letters 'E.T.' are visible on the chest. The hands are positioned in front of the body, with long, thin fingers, and the feet are wide and flat. The surface appears soft and slightly textured, typical of stuffed toys, with visible stitching along the seams. The overall appearance is endearing and designed to evoke the gentle, curious nature of the character.
description: A soft, plush E.T. toy wearing a blue hooded sweatshirt with large blue eyes and detailed hands and feet. The toy is designed to be cuddly and visually resembles the iconic movie character.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing E.T.'s large blue eyes, facial features, and the blue hooded sweatshirt with hands visible in front.
description_view_1: Right-side view highlighting the 'E.T.' text on the sweatshirt and the profile of the head and hands.
description_view_2: Rear-left view focusing on the back of the blue hooded sweatshirt and the rounded shape of the head.
description_view_3: Rear-right view showing the back of the hood and the overall posture of the toy.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral with wide, open blue eyes and a small, closed mouth, giving a gentle and curious appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: The toy is in a crouched or semi-sitting posture with both hands held together in front of the body and the head slightly tilted.
